assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends different strategies: autoscaled blue-green for L4 inference pool and surge with fine-tuning protection for A100 mixed pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with maxSurge settings

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response addresses GPU driver compatibility multiple times, including testing compatibility with inference frameworks and checking CUDA version changes

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response recommends using maintenance exclusions to block upgrades during fine-tuning periods and upgrading during planned gaps

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration — every upgrade requires pod restart' in the cluster assessment section

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PDBs in the pre-upgrade checklist: 'PDBs configured for inference deployments'

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in pre-upgrade checklist: 'Confirm autoscaler won't create new nodes at old version during upgrade' and mentions autoscaler works normally during blue-green transition

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response emphasizes testing GPU driver compatibility in staging cluster as 'MANDATORY' and includes it in the checklist and risk mitigation sections
